title: torularia dentata
intro: Torularia dentata, also known as Toothache Plant, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive heart-shaped leaves with pointed tips. The plant has been traditionally used for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular remedy for toothaches and other minor aches and pains. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds, which have been shown to have pain-relieving and anti-inflammatory effects. Toothache Plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of toothaches and other conditions.
